name: Grain
description: Grain meeting recording and intelligence platform integration for monitoring meeting recordings, team access, and compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Grain at grain.com
2. Go to Settings > Integrations > API tab
3. Generate a Workspace Access Token (requires admin access)
4. Copy the token and enter it above
5. More details: https://developers.grain.com/

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verify Grain is active and meeting recordings are being captured

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verify user access and team membership in Grain workspace

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verify webhook integrations are configured for meeting event notifications
